headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on ON Semiconductor, Lowers Price Target to $130
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe Quatrochi   maintains ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $140 to $130.
